Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “Wrap Up” tool. This tool is designed to be used as one of the very last things you do
before you and your event attendees finish either a long session, an entire day or an entire event. It is designed to help people acknowledge their
breakthroughs while simultaneously reminding others of things that they may have forgotten about. Then it holds you accountable to take action!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down your top 5 biggest breakthroughs or insights.
Write down the top 3 action items to put those breakthroughs or Insights into motion.
Write down two connections you made today that can help you.
Write down the words that can help you get back to your current ”action” state of mind.
Write down the pain will you feel if you don’t take action.
